title: Government Strategies | Resources | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Government strategies
BAL’s Government Strategies team leverages relationships with Washington’s immigration decision-makers and provides real-time guidance to help employers stay ahead of policy shifts.

## How the BAL Government Strategies team helps employers
- Advocacy, influence and litigation For over four decades, BAL has been at the forefront of shaping immigration law and policy, helping our clients navigate the unique political dynamics that surround the issues.

### Advocacy, influence and litigation
For over four decades, BAL has been at the forefront of shaping immigration law and policy, helping our clients navigate the unique political dynamics that surround the issues.
- Investigations and audits BAL is the go-to firm for immigration audits, and our attorneys have achieved successful results for multiple clients in high-stakes investigations.

### Investigations and audits
BAL is the go-to firm for immigration audits, and our attorneys have achieved successful results for multiple clients in high-stakes investigations.
- Employment eligibility and I-9 compliance BAL’s Government Strategies team provides clear, practical advice on Form I-9 and E-Verify compliance and represents companies during state and federal audits and investigations.

### Employment eligibility and I-9 compliance
BAL’s Government Strategies team provides clear, practical advice on Form I-9 and E-Verify compliance and represents companies during state and federal audits and investigations.

## A different practice that makes all the difference for our clients
Learn how the team directly supports BAL clients—and how this level of dedication sets us apart.

## What makes BAL's Government Strategies team exceptional?
Decades of experience working in and leading government immigration agencies uniquely empower our team to navigate policy shifts and deliver optimal immigration outcomes.

#### Extensive experience
Our team has over five decades of combined experience in the government, including leadership positions in the White House, the Department of Justice, the Department of Homeland Security and the Department of State.
BAL helps clients achieve their business objectives by developing and implementing creative, compliant legal strategies.

#### Long-standing relationships
Our team represents the leading trade organizations in the country and is well-respected by both political parties for our expertise, integrity and judgement.

## Actionable intelligence for immigration professionals
Members receive exclusive access to benchmarking, events and networking.

## See the Government Strategies team in action
When immigration fees rose by more than 165% across the board in April 2024, BAL’s Government Strategies team proactively advocated for employers and prepared clients for the fee hike.

## Strengthen your immigration program with BAL's Government Strategies team.
